description: Stormglass provides weather and marine forecasting data through an API, including forecast, historical, tide, astronomy, solar, elevation, and related environmental data. It offers global weather data products for applications such as marine, energy, agriculture, and consumer weather use cases.
summary: Stormglass exposes HTTP weather APIs: its current documented v2 REST API at `https://api.stormglass.io/v2` plus a cataloged OpenAPI-described Marine Weather API; both require a Stormglass API key. No public GraphQL API, MCP server, or official CLI was found.
